message:
refactor(security): apply pattern modernization to adversary graph, isolation rail router, and quarantine controller

Continue guard pattern modernization in three security modules:
- adversary_graph: simplify conditional chains
- isolation_rail_router: convert nested if-let to guard chains
- quarantine_controller: consistent pattern matching updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
